title: [synthetic-rds] Connection Exhaustion And CPU Saturation On search-prod

commonAnnotations.summary: search-prod is approaching connection limit (95%+ of max) while CPUUtilization is simultaneously at 88-94%. Both metrics crossed critical thresholds. Cause unclear — may be two independent issues or causally linked.
commonAnnotations.error: Dual resource exhaustion: connections and CPU both critical. New connections are being refused.
commonAnnotations.suspected_symptom: Search API is returning 503 errors. Existing queries are slow due to CPU contention.
